capabilities_used.evidence: [2024-02-29] 他把现货 ETF 批准定义为需求释放触发器："Full demand for #Bitcoin unleashed... he changed his mind when the spot ETF approved."；[2025-04-27] 也明确说 treasury buying / TradFi onramp 在数据里。
[2024-09-30] 直接发图并写："#Bitcoin is a proven safeguard against money printing. Global Liquidity has once again broken out"；附图 #7 也是 BTC 与 GLOBAL LIQUIDITY 的分段领先关系。
[2025-02-27] 明说："BTC's correlation to stocks takes out a cluster of liquidations..."；附图 #2 是 S&P 500 E-mini futures 配 RSI 与趋势线，用股指风险偏好来判断 BTC。
[2025-04-27] "Our Risk Model has started its trend back down. This means liquidity has returned to the market. Downside pull backs will be muted"；他反复把流动性变化当成 BTC 的主驱动。
[2025-05-30] "you have 2 days 16 hours to rally or your gonna print a bearish divergence on weekly charts"；附图 #5 顶部 RSI 区域画了下降趋势线、价格接近高位，典型周线看空背离框架。
[2025-04-27] "All dips are for buying under the present regime."；他不是逢点位交易，而是先定 regime，再决定所有回撤是否应被视作买点。
[2024-01-04] "The basis trade*** on BTC perpetuals is earning 75% right now, a level unseen since the 2021 bull market." 这是把高基差/过热杠杆作为反身性过热信号。
[2024-02-22] "Remember to hold for 4 years. It's never returned below 30% annualised for a 4 year investment"；[2024-11-30] 还调侃 "#Bitcoin bubbles of 2011, 2013, 2025 and 2029"，明显保留 4 年周期视角。
[2026-03-28] "Warning: BTC can stay oversold for more months that one can stay solvent." 这不是单纯超卖看多，而是明确反对在未确认前逆势接刀。
[2024-02-22] 他跟踪 GBTC 内部 BTC 的流出，把其命名为 "fleeing the land of greed"；虽然对象是基金载体而非单纯交易所，但本质仍是可交易供给回到市场的抛压框架。
[2025-01-25] "BTC chops around sideways quietly hiding coins being accumulated"；他经常把“横盘但筹码被强手吸收”当成中期偏多依据，和长期持币者锁仓思路一致。
[2025-02-27] 他把 liquidation cluster、neutral investor activity、urgency model 放在同一框架下读，强调不是单点预测，而是波动/风险状态切换；[2025-05-30] 说若周线背离成立则会 "be bored for weeks and weeks"，即波动压缩与 regime 切换。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Bitcoin Network Capital Flows
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track total, speculative, and short/medium-horizon capital entering or leaving the Bitcoin network, usually derived from realized-cap style flow models. Rising flows after a bottom imply accumulation and improving structure; declining flows during price strength imply weakening internals.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪进入或流出比特币网络的总资本、投机资本及 1d/7d/30d 期限资本流，通常基于 realized cap 类模型。底部后的流入回升代表吸筹与结构改善；价格走强但流量走弱则代表内在动能转差。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-01-25] "Capital inflows into the Bitcoin network starting to climb again, while BTC chops around sideways quietly hiding coins being accumulated"；附图 #1/#6/#8 都是这一套图。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Onchain VWAP Z-Score Extension
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 链上 VWAP 标准差扩张
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Measure how far spot price is stretched from onchain VWAP in standard deviations. Extreme positive readings indicate momentum overextension even if fundamentals remain bullish; prefer sideways reset or shallow pullback rather than chase.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 衡量现价相对链上 VWAP 偏离了多少个标准差。正向极值说明即便基本面偏多，价格也处于过度延伸状态，更适合等待横盘消化或浅回撤，而不是追高。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-04-27] "onchain VWAP is at +3 standard deviations, meaning it'll be hard to move upwards with decent momentum due to over extension."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Macro Cycle Risk Compression
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 宏观周期风险压缩模型
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use a composite macro/liquidity risk model to detect when investor risk is peaking, compressing, or rolling over. Falling macro-cycle risk implies liquidity returning to the network and downside becoming muted.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用宏观与流动性合成风险模型判断投资者风险是见顶、压缩还是回落。宏观周期风险下降，通常意味着流动性重新回到网络中，下行回撤会被削弱。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-08-30] "Macro Cycle Risk printed a lower high and has started a drop in risk"；[2025-04-27] "Our Risk Model has started its trend back down. This means liquidity has returned to the market."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: TradFi Treasury Reflexive Bid
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Model treasury-style buyers such as ETFs or listed companies as secondary demand engines that translate traditional capital markets access into reflexive BTC demand, amplifying upside beyond native crypto flows.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 ETF、上市公司金库买入等视为第二层需求引擎：它们把传统资本市场通道转化为反身性的 BTC 买盘，放大原生链上资金流的上涨效果。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-11-28] "The merger of #Bitcoin and TradFi is not going to make sense"；[2025-04-27] 他明确说数据里包含 treasury buying activities，它们是新的 TradFi onramp。

personal_quirks.quote: All dips are for buying under the present regime.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先判定市场 regime；只要大框架未坏，回撤默认是加仓机会，不是做空机会。

personal_quirks.quote: The Bitcoin chart that matters the most right now looks pretty good to me.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他高度依赖少数核心主图，而不是堆砌十几个技术指标；主图好看，其他噪音都降级。

personal_quirks.quote: Markets are always wrong in the short term and very roughly correct in the long term.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 短期价格容易被战术性博弈扭曲，长期才回归基本面与资本流。

personal_quirks.quote: Warning: BTC can stay oversold for more months that one can stay solvent.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要因为指标超卖就机械抄底；时机错误会先把你洗出局。

personal_quirks.quote: Bet macro bullish against technical bearish. Not a good setup.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 当宏观/基本面与技术面冲突时，不轻易高杠杆下注；等待两者重新对齐。

unique_traits: 他和纯 TA 交易员最大的不同，是把 BTC 当成可被链上资本流、ETF/公司金库买盘、全球流动性共同驱动的“网络资产”，而不是单一 K 线标的。技术分析在他这里更多是择时和风险压缩工具，真正的方向锚来自链上资金流与宏观流动性。另一个鲜明特点是长期显著偏多，但短期并不盲目追价，常用背离、VWAP 偏离和风险模型来避免在过热阶段犯错。

high_conviction_phrases: The chart that matters the most
liquidity has returned to the market
